name: watch-mode
brief: Add file-watching functionality to simulabractl and build.sh so they can automatically re-run on source changes.

name: tree-tool
brief: Create bin/tree.js CLI tool and Claude Code agent skill that prints a recursive listing of files and their Simulabra classes, ignoring node_modules/out/tmp/misc.

name: agenda-projects
brief: Add projects as first-class entities to the Agenda app with context-driven Geist integration, project-scoped items, and prompting support.

name: geist-evals
brief: Minimal extensible evals system for the agenda geist — prepopulated test DB, eval scenarios, inspection of LLM outputs and tool calls.

name: eval-providers
brief: Add OpenRouter/OpenAI-compatible provider support to the geist and eval system, enabling model comparison across providers.

name: agenda-compost
brief: Review the agenda app's Simulabra usage patterns and produce a prompt alignment document for follow-on agent work.

name: agenda-review
brief: Review agenda code patterns and produce framework feedback with analysis.

name: workspace-split
brief: Split monorepo into independent repos under bun workspace (simulabra-world). Extract agenda, swyperloom, demos, sps. Build sgit for multi-repo git.
